content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach deploys the exact diagnostic signature question from the expected territory ('what are you not saying to them?') as the opening move — verbatim alignment with the golden path. Subsequent moves are also signature AoA: noticing the pause (somatic/micro-cue tracking), 'whose voice is that?' (a classic AoA move surfacing introjected voices), the body-sensation question (feel-over-figure), and 'are you checking right now, or telling me?' (distinguishing report from direct experience — a hallmark AoA distinction). No CBT reframing, no IFS-parts language, no pop-psych vocabulary, no evangelizing. The coach does not take 'we're fine' at face value (avoiding trap 1) and does not insist something is wrong (avoiding trap 2). Each signature move is deployed at an appropriate moment given what the client just said. This is methodology applied, not decorated.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with the exact diagnostic signature question 'what are you not saying?' — directly from expected territory."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracks the micro-pause — somatic/cue-level attention consistent with AoA."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Hypothetical question; not strictly signature AoA but not anti-pattern either."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'What do you want that you haven't asked for?' — a signature AoA question surfacing suppressed desire."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Whose voice is that?' — classic AoA move surfacing introjected/inherited voices behind a dismissal."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Body-sensation question — feel-over-figure move at an appropriate moment when the client has just intellectualized."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Are you checking right now, or telling me?' — surfaces the distinction between direct experience and report; precise AoA-style intervention."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["what-are-you-defending", "lets-go-there", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "the-happiness-filter"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["walking-on-eggshells (not yet named, but appropriately so — evidence still surfacing)", "complementary-trauma-surfaces"],
  "notes": "The 'what are you defending' question isn't quoted verbatim but its function is fulfilled by turns 8, 10, 14. Not naming the pattern yet is correct given the golden path (only name after evidence surfaces)."
}
